name: Quickie Pasta Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pasta, penne, rotini or shell
1 can Tomatoes, 28 oz, crushed or diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cook pasta on the stove and drain.
3. Meanwhile, heat oil in a saucepan.
4. Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft (about 5 minutes).
5. Add tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper; cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
6. Combine cooked pasta, sauce, and half the grated cheese in an ovenproof dish.
7. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes at 350°F.
